purpose: Update Lane 5 handoff with evidence split between completed v1 SDXL EC2 output and unresolved v1.1 runtime request state.

proves: AI_Front text-planning can run on local OpenAI-compatible endpoint

audit_items.audit_summary: v1 preset and request evidence are traceable and had a runtime candidate execution path on EC2.
proves: runtime request and execution artifact were prepared

audit_items.audit_summary: Lane 4 evidence confirms an EC2 SDXL generation for the earlier v1 request with remote image hash de8e72..., but no v1.1 evidence is present in this record.
proves: real candidate generation succeeded on EC2 for v1 request
does_not_prove: final stop-state proof for EC2 instance

audit_items.audit_summary: Lane 6 created a new blocker artifact clarifying that the v1.1 request has no completion payload in ec2_requests/processed and no v1.1 media exists.

pending_external_actions.needed_result: New completion payload for v1.1 candidate (hash + remote/local path + strict hand/anatomy review recommendation) OR a precise model/runtime blocker with same request id.
If reused as fallback, explicit statement that this is v1 only and not a v1.1 substitute.

recommended_lane_5_action: Preserve v1.1 as needs_more_evidence; audit v1 runtime output only as historical proof. Do not promote Lane 6 SDXL media claims until v1.1 completion and strict visual hand review are returned.
